name: Varun Basu
role: VP, Growth and Partnerships, eGov Foundation
body: Varun is Vice President for Growth and Partnerships at eGov Foundation, driving adoption of digital public infrastructure for social impact. He was earlier Head of Global Sales at LitmusWorld and co-founded Getkrrackin. At eGov he builds the partner ecosystem around platforms like DIGIT and the court technology behind PUCAR.
